//: OIDC trust policy for the sre-agent IAM role (IRSA — IAM Roles for Service Accounts).
Replace ACCOUNT_ID, REGION, and CLUSTER_OIDC_ID with your EKS cluster's values.
Find CLUSTER_OIDC_ID with: aws eks describe-cluster --name <cluster> --query 'cluster.identity.oidc.issuer'
The condition pins the role to the exact ServiceAccount in the sre-agent namespace —
no other pod or namespace can assume it even if the OIDC provider is shared.
